name: ccx
description: Automated dev loops with Codex review gates. Provides /ccx:loop, /ccx:forever, /ccx:supervisor (parallel worker orchestrator with autonomous chat_ask answering, scope-overlap gating, and stuck-exit auto-revise), /ccx:plan (seeds BOARD.md task rows from a prompt or document), and an optional Discord chat bridge (/ccx:chat-setup + --chat).
